title: How to extract the last name from a full name
task: Pull just the last name out of a 'First Last' text string.
keywords: get surname from full name google sheets

excel.note: Start one character after the space and take the rest.

google_sheets.note: Identical. TEXTAFTER(A2," ") also works in newer versions.

explanation: FIND(" ",A2)+1 is the position just after the first space; MID takes from there through the end of the string (LEN as a safe length). For 'Jane Doe' it returns 'Doe'. Note this returns everything after the first space, so 'Jane Van Doe' would give 'Van Doe'.
